get.description: Health check endpoint for monitoring and load balancers.

post.description:
Invalidate all outstanding JWTs for the current user.

SECURITY (CRIT-2): bumps token_version so every previously-issued JWT
for this user fails the version check in get_current_user.
Mark a help page as seen for the current user.

get.description: Public endpoint returning registration status and Turnstile site key.

post.description: Register a new user (pending approval).

schema.title: Response List Events Api Events Get

get.description: List all archived and expired events for the current user.

schema.title: Response List Archived Events Api Events Archived Get

get.description: Get recent activity log entries for the current user's events.

schema.title: Response Get Activity Log Api Events Activity Get

delete.description: Delete an event and all its requests.

get.description:
Public search endpoint for event guests.

Priority: Tidal (primary) → Spotify (fallback) → Beatport (event toggle).
Results are filtered for junk, deduplicated by ISRC, and sorted by popularity.

schema.title: Response Event Search Api Events  Code  Search Get

post.description: Bulk delete multiple events owned by the current user.
Archive an event.
Unarchive an event.

patch.description: Update display settings for an event (e.g., hide/show now playing on kiosk).

get.description: Get current display settings for an event.
Export event requests as CSV. Owner can export regardless of event status.
Export play history as CSV. Owner can export regardless of event status.

schema.title: Response Get Event Requests Api Events  Code  Requests Get

post.description: Accept all NEW requests for an event in one operation.
Reject all NEW requests for an event in one operation.

delete.description: Bulk delete requests for an event, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Generate song recommendations based on the event's musical profile.

get.description: List the DJ's playlists from connected music services.

post.description: Generate recommendations using a template playlist.
Generate song recommendations from an LLM-interpreted DJ prompt.
Upload a custom banner image for the event.

delete.description: Delete the event's custom banner image.

get.description: Get pre-event collection scheduling settings.

schema.title: Response Get Collection Settings Api Events  Code  Collection Get
Response Update Collection Settings Endpoint Api Events  Code  Collection Patch

get.description: Get pending review data source for DJ bulk-review.

post.description:
Queue enrichment for up to ENRICH_ALL_BATCH_LIMIT requests missing BPM, key, or genre.

Batched to avoid exhausting the connection pool when many tracks need enrichment.
Returns `remaining` so the caller can re-invoke until 0.

delete.description: Delete a single request. Ownership verified via event.

post.description: Clear existing metadata and re-enrich from external services.

Upvote a song request. Idempotent: voting twice has no effect.

Requires a guest cookie. Anonymous callers receive 401.

delete.description:
Remove vote from a song request. Idempotent.

Requires a guest cookie. Anonymous callers receive 401.

get.description: DJ search endpoint. Tidal primary, Spotify fallback.

delete.description: Clear all cached search results (admin only).

get.description: Get public kiosk display data for an event.
Get publicly visible requests for an event (NEW and ACCEPTED only).
Check if the current client has submitted any requests for this event.
Get all requests submitted by the current client for this event.

post.description: Resolve guest identity via cookie token and/or browser fingerprint.
Validate a Turnstile token and issue a wrzdj_human session cookie.

Send a verification code to the provided email.

Requires a fresh Turnstile token (separate from the session cookie) to
protect against email-cost / sender-reputation abuse.
Confirm a verification code. May trigger guest merge.

get.description:
Read the calling guest's profile for this event. Anonymous callers
(no cookie) get the default empty profile — there is no IP fallback.

post.description: Lightweight Beatport BPM/key lookup for search-time vibes — no DB writes.

get.description:
Public SSE endpoint for real-time event updates.

SECURITY (CRIT-5): rate-limited and existence-checked. Before this fix,
the endpoint had no rate limit and no existence check, allowing
unauthenticated DoS (unlimited long-lived connections exhausting FDs)
and passive eavesdropping via 6-char event-code brute force.

Event types:
- request_created: New request submitted
- request_status_changed: Request status update
- now_playing_changed: Now-playing track update
- requests_bulk_update: Batch accept/reject
- bridge_status_changed: Bridge connect/disconnect

Return the server's bridge API key to an admin user.

The GUI uses this so the DJ doesn't have to manually paste the key.
Restricted to admins to prevent non-owners from impersonating the bridge.

post.description:
Bridge reports a new track playing.

Called when the DJ loads/plays a new track on their equipment.
Archives the previous track to play history and updates now_playing.
Rate limited to 60 requests per minute.

Bridge reports connection status.

Called when bridge connects/disconnects from DJ equipment.
Rate limited to 30 requests per minute.

delete.description:
Bridge signals track ended / deck cleared.

Archives current track to history and clears now_playing.
Rate limited to 60 requests per minute.

get.description:
Get current now-playing track for public display.

Returns the track currently playing from StageLinQ, or None if nothing playing.

schema.title: Response Get Public Now Playing Api Public E  Code  Nowplaying Get

get.description:
Get bridge connection status for public display.

Independent of track data — returns bridge connectivity even when
no track is currently playing.

Get play history for public display.

Returns the list of tracks played during the event, newest first.

post.description:
Queue a command for the bridge to pick up.

Requires JWT auth. The user must own the event or be an admin.
Rate limited to 10 requests per minute.

get.description:
Poll and clear pending commands for the bridge.

Requires bridge API key auth. Returns all pending commands and clears the queue.
Rate limited to 30 requests per minute.

post.description:
Start Tidal device login flow.

Returns a URL and code for the user to visit and authorize.
The frontend should poll /auth/check to wait for completion.

get.description:
Check if device login is complete.

Returns:
- complete: true if login succeeded
- pending: true if still waiting for user
- error: error message if login failed

post.description: Cancel pending device login.

get.description: Check if current user has linked Tidal account.

post.description: Unlink Tidal account from current user.

get.description: Search Tidal for tracks.

schema.title: Response Search Api Tidal Search Get

get.description: Get Tidal sync settings for an event.

put.description: Update Tidal sync settings for an event.

post.description: Manually trigger Tidal sync for a request.
Manually link a Tidal track to a request.

Authenticate with Beatport using username/password.

The backend logs in to Beatport server-side, obtains an authorization
code, exchanges it for tokens, and stores them on the user.

get.description: Check if current user has linked Beatport account.

post.description: Unlink Beatport account from current user.

get.description: Search Beatport for tracks.

schema.title: Response Search Api Beatport Search Get

get.description: Get Beatport sync settings for an event.

put.description: Update Beatport sync settings for an event.

post.description:
Manually link a Beatport track to a request.

Verifies the track exists on Beatport, then stores the
Beatport URL and metadata in sync_results_json.

get.description: Issue a one-time IP-bound nonce required for kiosk pairing.

post.description:
Create a new kiosk pairing session.

Requires a valid X-Pair-Nonce header obtained from /pair-challenge,
bound to the same client IP. Nonce is consumed on use.

get.description: Poll the status of a pairing code.

Poll the kiosk's current event assignment. Updates last_seen_at.

Session token must be sent in the X-Kiosk-Session header (not in the URL path)
to prevent token leakage in access logs.

post.description: Complete a kiosk pairing by assigning an event.

get.description: List all kiosks paired by the current user.

schema.title: Response List My Kiosks Api Kiosk Mine Get

patch.description: Change which event a kiosk displays.
Admin can edit any event (not just their own).

post.description: Admin can bulk delete events from any owner.

get.description: Get status of all external integrations (no active health checks).

patch.description: Enable or disable a specific integration.

post.description: Run an active health check for a specific service (rate limited).

get.description: List available AI models.
Get AI/LLM configuration.
